expectations.evidence: The plan content was loaded successfully showing '# Add Authentication' with the correct steps, indicating plans/add-auth.md was resolved.
Neither response.md nor plan-mode-content.md contain YAML front matter. Only markdown content is present.

expectations.text: Adds metadata comment with path and status
expectations.evidence: plan-mode-content.md has '<!-- project-plan-source: add-auth.md, status: draft -->' — the path is 'add-auth.md' (bare name) rather than the full relative path 'plans/add-auth.md'.
response.md shows the plan content without any HTML metadata comment.
Both response.md and plan-mode-content.md contain '# Add Authentication'.

suggestions.assertion: Adds metadata comment with path and status
suggestions.reason: This expectation says 'with path and status' but doesn't specify the exact path format. The old skill stores 'add-auth.md' instead of 'plans/add-auth.md'. The load-nondefault-path eval explicitly tests for FULL relative path. Consider making this expectation more explicit about requiring the full resolved path.

eval_feedback.overall: The path-in-metadata expectation could be more explicit about what constitutes the correct path value.
